boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer portability file released to verified account owner.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: account ownership and portability format approval match

critical_features_preserved: account ownership and portability format approval match
final_answer: Control record shows missing ownership and format approval match for the exact portability release. Policy requires current source closure before execution. No authority from tone, urgency, or fallback notes. Escalate to resolve dependency.
open_blockers: account ownership and portability format approval match
